title: Monerma cylindrica
parts: Monerma cylindrica is a plant species in the family Annonaceae. I can find limited information regarding Monerma cylindrica, but one source suggests the leaves of Monerma cylindrica may be used in traditional medicine. The leaves of Monerma cylindrica are said to have anti-inflammatory properties. However, more research is needed to confirm the medicinal properties of Monerma cylindrica. The plant is native to tropical regions and more studies are required to fully understand its potential medicinal uses.
